Frontend framework/library assumed to be React.
Backend framework/language assumed to be Node.js with Express.
Database type assumed to be PostgreSQL.
Authentication method assumed to be email/password for user registration/login, utilizing JWT for session management.
Task attributes assumed to include title, description, due date, priority (e.g., Low, Medium, High), and completion status.
Styling preferences assumed to use Tailwind CSS for UI design.
Deployment strategy assumed to involve Docker for containerization of both frontend and backend.
API design assumed to be RESTful API.
Error handling and logging assumed to be basic, focusing on common error types and console logging.
Testing requirements assumed to include basic unit tests for core logic on both frontend and backend.
